remarks: POPULAR MALLARDS LANDING. (Short term rent to buy option available). Recently renovated 2BR/2BA second floor unit. Kitchen recently updated. New deck, new sliding glass doors, new windows. Freshly painted. Bright, spacious layout with open living/dining area. Generous room sizes throughout. Includes 2 reserved parking spaces: 1 carport + 1 open. Complex features in-ground pool and private storage unit. Prime mid-city location near Norwalk/Darien border. Minutes to Route 1 & I-95. Walk to Connecticut Ave shopping: Wegmans, Costco, Home Depot. Short drive to SoNo and Metro-North train station.
